ab: ka tjiyau vaik amen ka tji vuvu a sema papaveliyan a paveli,na kemacu tji vuvu tu a makara ljacen,sa na seman kakanen a ngauta ta ru sipaveli.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: tjenglai a caucau tua nji vuvu a siubai, aza silji kata ljameljam mapa veli a ravac, sa tjuruvu a ngautan a caucau tu keman ta kinesa nji vuvu.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，辣椒和生薑很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the chilis and ginger, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: aza cinavu ka ta pinu ljameljam a kinsa kata pinu makau a vutjulj na vavui salum sa na masiup pa makara caucau sa tjuruvu a na paitui i ta na siubai.
ch: 她煮的芋粉包和生薑飯非常好吃，還有用山豬肉煮的馬告滷肉，味道吸引了很多客人，大家都來我們攤位排隊。
en: The taro buns and ginger rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: nu kemesakesa tji vuvu tjaken a paveliveli, sa ku pasiaca a zemalazala. tjiamen a na tejmalem ini’ a  katjedukuan kelju kelju veliu.
ch: 奶奶煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我在一旁大喊著：「蔬菜都是自己種的，天然有機，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, \"The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!\"

ab: palamu maka paveli a ngamen. tjisun sa na makaya tjen na mayatucu aya tji vuvu a ivu tja nuaken.
ch: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \"It’s all thanks to your help.\"

ab: aicu a njia kinianan a siubaibbai liau angan ku kineljan a pa ka tana kacalisian a djami a kakanen sa na pavavalanga ken tu zelian nu siubaibai.
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: a puvarungan kata tjengelaiyan nji vuvu tua kakaen na kinacalisianan na masi miazuan kata masilevan aken a ravac.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常驕傲和榮幸。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
